name: green ogre gives you terrible life advice and dies
short_description: Enter the swamp and meet green ogre who will guide you through some of the struggles of life by giving you some God tier advice.
detailed_description:
Welcome to the swamp, the natural habitat of the wise green ogre who is ready to offer you exactly five life-changing pieces of advice for a price. Will you pay the green ogre toll to enter the swamp bole?

Features

  • Stunning graphics made entirely in Microsoft Paint.
  • Heavenly OST featuring one entire track.
  • Raunchy humor.
  • Edgy advice.
  • Knowledgeable green ogre.

This game is not suitable for children.
Not all of green ogre's advice should be taken seriously.
